subcodes.title: Words spoken at Morse home in Paris, 1913-03-13
subcodes.first_line: You are aware of the situation in the East; you know how grievously its horizon was enveloped with the darkness of ignorance and prejudice
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوش آمدید من وقتی کتاب شما را دیدم خیلی مسرور شدم میخواستم شما را ملاقات و... شما از شرق خیر دارید که چه قدر افق شرق را ظلمت تعصب و نادانی احاطه کرده بود
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @unity in diversity, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @unity; oneness of humanity, @martyrs and martyrdom
